allow: Reading any files in the repository
Running dotnet build, dotnet test, dotnet format on api/Continia.Card.slnx
Running pnpm build, lint, test, check-types, dev, format in spa/ or mobile-app/
Git operations on feature branches (commit, push, fetch, rebase)
Using Azure DevOps MCP tools for PRs and work items
Creating and editing files in the project under api/, spa/, mobile-app/, docs/, .claude/
soft_deny: Pushing directly to main or master
Modifying .env or .env.local files in any stack
Running destructive git commands (reset --hard, clean -f, branch -D)
Modifying CI/CD pipeline files under .azuredevops/ or .eas/
Changing authentication or security configuration (Auth0, Signicat, Adyen secrets)
environment: Next.js 16 App Router admin portal (spa/, Turborepo, React 19, Tailwind 4, Auth0 BFF)
Expo React Native mobile app (mobile-app/) for cardholders
Azure DevOps for source control and pipelines
Azure Key Vault for secrets; Azure SQL for persistence; Azure Container Apps for prod hosting
Adyen card issuer, Signicat identity verification, Auth0 authentication
